query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `skillLearningSchedule` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `isEnabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `frequency` enum('daily','weekly','monthly') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'weekly',
  `dayOfWeek` int,
  `dayOfMonth` int,
  `hour` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  `minute` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `learnFromNewTours` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `maxToursPerRun` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `minTourAge` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `autoApplyHighConfidence` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `autoApplyThreshold` decimal(3,2) DEFAULT '0.90',
  `notifyOnComplete` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `notifyOnNewSuggestions` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `lastRunAt` timestamp,
  `lastRunStatus` enum('success','failed','partial'),
  `lastRunHistoryId` int,
  `nextRunAt` timestamp,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `skillLearningSchedule_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
